---
title: "yellowstone covou analysis"
output: html_document
---

# setup

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE
)
```

# paths and packages

```{r paths-and-packages}
rm(list = ls())
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
set.seed(2024)

project_dir <- "C:/Users/maata/Downloads/DRSTERNER/paleoTS_project/paleoTS/paleoTS/"
root_dir    <- "C:/Users/maata/Downloads/DRSTERNER"

trait_paths <- list(
  Diameter = file.path(root_dir, "Theriot et al 2006 dia.txt"),
  Ribs     = file.path(root_dir, "Theriot et al 2006 ribs.txt"),
  Spines   = file.path(root_dir, "Theriot et al 2006 spines.txt")
)

pollen_path <- file.path(root_dir, "Theriot2006-PinusContortusPollenData.csv")
inso_path   <- file.path(root_dir, "inso_June.txt")

output_dir <- file.path(root_dir, "covOU_state_space_outputs")
fig_dir    <- file.path(output_dir, "figures")
tab_dir    <- file.path(output_dir, "tables")
rds_dir    <- file.path(output_dir, "rds")

# these values control the  adequacy runs and the variance-shift sensitivity fits
pool_models <- FALSE
nboot_baseline <- 250L
nboot_covou <- 250L
nboot_sensitivity <- 200L
vshift_breaks_bp <- c(11000)

load_required_packages <- function(pkgs) {
  missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE, FUN.VALUE = logical(1))]
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    stop("install these packages before running: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
  }
  invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE))
}

load_required_packages(c(
  "devtools", "paleoTS", "dplyr", "purrr", "tibble", "tidyr", "ggplot2",
  "readr", "stringr", "knitr"
))

setwd(project_dir)
devtools::load_all(project_dir, quiet = TRUE)

dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(tab_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(rds_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

message("starting yellowstone covou analysis")
```

# helper functions

helper functions  
```{r helper-functions}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

safe_read_table <- function(path, ...) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("File not found: ", path)
  read.table(path, ...)
}

safe_read_csv <- function(path, ...) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("File not found: ", path)
  read.csv(path, ...)
}

# these functions build the model-comparison tables after each set of fits is finished
make_aicc <- function(logL, K, n) {
  -2 * logL + 2 * K + (2 * K * (K + 1)) / (n - K - 1)
}

empty_model_table <- function() {
  tibble(
    Trait = character(),
    Analysis_Set = character(),
    Model = character(),
    logL = numeric(),
    K = integer(),
    n = integer(),
    AICc = numeric(),
    deltaAICc = numeric(),
    weight = numeric()
  )
}

safe_bind_rows <- function(x) {
  x <- purrr::compact(x)
  if (length(x) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  dplyr::bind_rows(x)
}

add_ic_columns <- function(df, n_col = "n") {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(empty_model_table())
  df %>%
    mutate(
      AICc = make_aicc(logL = .data$logL, K = .data$K, n = .data[[n_col]])
    ) %>%
    group_by(Trait, Analysis_Set) %>%
    arrange(AICc, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      deltaAICc = AICc - min(AICc, na.rm = TRUE),
      weight = exp(-0.5 * deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * deltaAICc), na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# these summary statistics are used for the bootstrap adequacy checks
half_life_from_alpha <- function(alpha) {
  ifelse(is.na(alpha) | alpha <= 0, NA_real_, log(2) / alpha)
}

safe_acf1 <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  stats::acf(x, lag.max = 1, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)$acf[2]
}

runs_z_stat <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  x <- x[x != 0]
  if (length(x) < 10) return(NA_real_)
  signs <- ifelse(x > 0, 1L, 0L)
  n1 <- sum(signs == 1L)
  n0 <- sum(signs == 0L)
  if (n1 == 0L || n0 == 0L) return(NA_real_)
  runs <- 1L + sum(signs[-1] != signs[-length(signs)])
  mu <- (2 * n1 * n0) / (n1 + n0) + 1
  vr <- (2 * n1 * n0 * (2 * n1 * n0 - n1 - n0)) /
    (((n1 + n0)^2) * (n1 + n0 - 1))
  if (!is.finite(vr) || vr <= 0) return(NA_real_)
  (runs - mu) / sqrt(vr)
}

var_ratio_early_late <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) < 8) return(NA_real_)
  idx <- floor(length(x) / 2)
  x1 <- x[seq_len(idx)]
  x2 <- x[(idx + 1):length(x)]
  v1 <- stats::var(x1)
  v2 <- stats::var(x2)
  if (!is.finite(v1) || !is.finite(v2) || v2 <= 0) return(NA_real_)
  v1 / v2
}

standardized_innovations <- function(fit) {
  if (is.null(fit$kf$innov) || is.null(fit$kf$sig)) {
    return(rep(NA_real_, length(fit$parameters)))
  }
  innov <- as.numeric(fit$kf$innov)
  sig <- sqrt(as.numeric(fit$kf$sig))
  sig[!is.finite(sig) | sig <= 0] <- NA_real_
  innov / sig
}

adequacy_stats <- function(fit) {
  z <- standardized_innovations(fit)
  c(
    mean = mean(z, na.rm = TRUE),
    variance = stats::var(z, na.rm = TRUE),
    acf1 = safe_acf1(z),
    runs_z = runs_z_stat(z),
    early_late_var_ratio = var_ratio_early_late(z)
  )
}

two_sided_boot_p <- function(obs, sims) {
  sims <- sims[is.finite(sims)]
  if (!is.finite(obs) || length(sims) < 10) return(NA_real_)
  cdf <- mean(sims <= obs)
  2 * min(cdf, 1 - cdf)
}

# these functions pull fitted values and parameters out of the paleoTSfit objects
extract_state_fit <- function(fit) {
  tibble(
    fitted = as.numeric(fit$kf$xf[1, 1, ]),
    var_f = as.numeric(fit$kf$Pf[1, 1, ])
  )
}

extract_parameter_summary <- function(fit, trait, model, analysis_set) {
  pp <- fit$parameters
  tibble(
    Trait = trait,
    Analysis_Set = analysis_set,
    Model = model,
    anc = unname(pp["anc"] %||% NA_real_),
    theta = unname(pp["theta"] %||% NA_real_),
    vstep = unname(pp["vstep"] %||% NA_real_),
    vstep1 = unname(pp["vstep1"] %||% NA_real_),
    vstep2 = unname(pp["vstep2"] %||% NA_real_),
    alpha = unname(pp["alpha"] %||% NA_real_),
    half_life = half_life_from_alpha(unname(pp["alpha"] %||% NA_real_)),
    b0 = unname(pp["b0"] %||% NA_real_),
    b1 = unname(pp["b1"] %||% NA_real_),
    b2 = unname(pp["b2"] %||% NA_real_),
    mstep = unname(pp["mstep"] %||% NA_real_),
    omega = unname(pp["omega"] %||% NA_real_),
    r = unname(pp["r"] %||% NA_real_),
    logL = fit$logL,
    K = fit$K
  )
}

build_segment_groups_bp <- function(time_bp, breaks_bp) {
  if (length(breaks_bp) == 0) return(rep(1L, length(time_bp)))
  breaks_bp <- sort(unique(breaks_bp), decreasing = TRUE)
  1L + rowSums(outer(time_bp, breaks_bp, `<=`))
}


# reads one trait series, builds the additive/log objects and interpolates the pollen and insolation series to the same time grid
prep_trait_series <- function(trait_file,
                              pollen_df,
                              inso_df,
                              label,
                              trait_sep = "\t") {
  tr <- safe_read_table(trait_file, header = TRUE, sep = trait_sep, check.names = FALSE)

  req_cols <- c("mm", "vv", "N", "age")
  miss <- setdiff(req_cols, names(tr))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop("Trait file is missing required columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "),
         " in file ", trait_file)
  }

  ts_add <- as.paleoTS(
    mm = tr$mm,
    vv = tr$vv,
    nn = tr$N,
    tt = tr$age,
    label = label
  )

  ts_log <- ln.paleoTS(ts_add)
  time_bp <- ts_add$start.age - ts_add$tt

  # the new ssm code centers covariates internally, so the raw interpolated
  # covariates are passed in here and then centered inside the fitter
  pollen_interp <- stats::approx(
    x = pollen_df$Years,
    y = pollen_df$Prop,
    xout = time_bp,
    rule = 2
  )$y

  inso_interp <- stats::approx(
    x = inso_df$Years,
    y = inso_df$Inso,
    xout = time_bp,
    rule = 2
  )$y

  tibble_cov <- tibble(
    time_bp = time_bp,
    time_kyr_bp = time_bp / 1000,
    pollen_prop = pollen_interp,
    inso_june = inso_interp
  )

  list(
    label = label,
    additive = ts_add,
    log = ts_log,
    covariates = tibble_cov,
    Z_inso = matrix(tibble_cov$inso_june, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(NULL, "Insolation")),
    Z_poll = matrix(tibble_cov$pollen_prop, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(NULL, "Pollen")),
    Z_both = cbind(
      Insolation = tibble_cov$inso_june,
      Pollen = tibble_cov$pollen_prop
    ),
    Z_time = matrix(tibble_cov$time_kyr_bp, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(NULL, "Time_kyrBP"))
  )
}

# ordinary least squares is kept only as a descriptive comparison and is not
# included in the stochastic model ranking
fit_ols_baseline <- function(y, Z, model_label = "OLS_both") {
  df <- data.frame(y = y$mm, Z)
  fit <- lm(y ~ ., data = df)
  n <- length(y$mm)
  K <- length(coef(fit))
  LL <- as.numeric(logLik(fit))
  tibble(Model = model_label, logL = LL, K = K, n = n,
         AICc = make_aicc(LL, K, n))
}

# hessian refinement is only used where the current build is stable enough
# to return a variance-covariance matrix
supports_hessian_refinement <- function(model_id) {
  !model_id %in% c(
    "covOU_inso", "covOU_poll", "covOU_both", "timeOU",
    "covOU_inso_vshift", "covOU_both_vshift"
  )
}

# the covariate-ou fits use simple parscale settings so the optimizers are
# not relying on getAllParscale for the transformed parameter names
build_model_control <- function(model_id, gg = NULL) {
  cl <- list(fnscale = -1, maxit = 5000)
  if (model_id %in% c("covOU_inso", "covOU_poll", "timeOU")) {
    cl$parscale <- rep(1, 5L)
  } else if (model_id == "covOU_both") {
    cl$parscale <- rep(1, 6L)
  } else if (model_id == "covOU_inso_vshift") {
    nseg <- max(gg)
    cl$parscale <- rep(1, nseg + 4L)
  } else if (model_id == "covOU_both_vshift") {
    nseg <- max(gg)
    cl$parscale <- rep(1, nseg + 5L)
  }
  cl
}

# this is the main function used throughout the notebook to call the
# appropriate state-space fitter for each candidate model
fit_single_model <- function(model_id, y, Z_map, pool = FALSE, hess = FALSE, gg = NULL) {
  cl <- build_model_control(model_id = model_id, gg = gg)

  if (isTRUE(hess) && !supports_hessian_refinement(model_id)) {
    hess <- FALSE
  }

  switch(
    model_id,
    "Stasis" = opt.ssm.Stasis(y = y, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "URW" = opt.ssm.URW(y = y, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "GRW" = opt.ssm.GRW(y = y, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "OU" = opt.ssm.OU(y = y, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "ACDC" = opt.ssm.ACDC(y = y, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "covOU_inso" = opt.ssm.covOU(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_inso, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "covOU_poll" = opt.ssm.covOU(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_poll, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "covOU_both" = opt.ssm.covOU(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_both, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "timeOU" = opt.ssm.covOU(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_time, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "URW_shift" = opt.ssm.URWshift(y = y, gg = gg, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "covOU_inso_vshift" = opt.ssm.covOU_vshift(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_inso, gg = gg, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    "covOU_both_vshift" = opt.ssm.covOU_vshift(y = y, Z = Z_map$Z_both, gg = gg, pool = pool, hess = hess, cl = cl),
    stop("Unknown model_id: ", model_id)
  )
}

safe_fit_model <- function(...) {
  tryCatch(
    fit_single_model(...),
    error = function(e) {
      warning("Model fit failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      NULL
    }
  )
}

# this function fits one full model set for one trait and returns both the raw
# fitted objects and the model-comparison table built from those fits
fit_model_set <- function(trait_name,
                          y,
                          Z_map,
                          analysis_set,
                          model_ids,
                          pool = FALSE,
                          hess = FALSE,
                          gg = NULL) {
  fits <- purrr::set_names(vector("list", length(model_ids)), model_ids)
  for (mid in model_ids) {
    message("fitting ", analysis_set, " for ", trait_name, ": ", mid)
    fits[[mid]] <- safe_fit_model(model_id = mid, y = y, Z_map = Z_map, pool = pool, hess = hess, gg = gg)
  }

  tab_list <- purrr::imap(fits, function(fit, nm) {
    if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
    tibble(
      Trait = trait_name,
      Analysis_Set = analysis_set,
      Model = nm,
      logL = fit$logL,
      K = fit$K,
      n = length(y$mm)
    )
  })
  tab <- safe_bind_rows(tab_list)

  if (nrow(tab) == 0) return(list(table = empty_model_table(), fits = fits))
  list(table = add_ic_columns(tab, n_col = "n"), fits = fits)
}

# simulation is done on the observed time grid so the bootstrap adequacy checks
# use the same interval and the same observation variances as the data
simulate_fitted_ssm <- function(y, fit, model_id, Z_map, gg = NULL) {
  n <- length(y$mm)
  dt <- c(0, diff(y$tt))
  obs_var <- y$vv / y$nn
  pp <- fit$parameters

  x <- numeric(n)
  x[1] <- unname(pp["anc"] %||% y$mm[1])

  if (model_id == "Stasis") {
    theta <- unname(pp["theta"])
    omega <- unname(pp["omega"])
    x <- rnorm(n, mean = theta, sd = sqrt(max(omega, 0)))
  } else if (model_id == "URW") {
    vs <- unname(pp["vstep"])
    for (i in 2:n) x[i] <- x[i - 1] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(vs * dt[i], 0)))
  } else if (model_id == "GRW") {
    vs <- unname(pp["vstep"])
    ms <- unname(pp["mstep"])
    for (i in 2:n) x[i] <- x[i - 1] + ms * dt[i] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(vs * dt[i], 0)))
  } else if (model_id == "OU") {
    vs <- unname(pp["vstep"])
    alpha <- unname(pp["alpha"])
    theta <- unname(pp["theta"])
    for (i in 2:n) {
      G <- exp(-alpha * dt[i])
      Q <- (vs / (2 * alpha)) * (1 - exp(-2 * alpha * dt[i]))
      x[i] <- G * x[i - 1] + (1 - G) * theta + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(Q, 0)))
    }
  } else if (model_id == "ACDC") {
    vs0 <- unname(pp["vstep0"] %||% pp["vstep"])
    r <- unname(pp["r"])
    si <- y$tt - y$tt[1]
    if (abs(r) < 1e-10) {
      Qinc <- vs0 * dt
    } else {
      V <- vs0 * (expm1(r * si) / r)
      Qinc <- c(0, diff(V))
    }
    for (i in 2:n) x[i] <- x[i - 1] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(Qinc[i], 0)))
  } else if (model_id %in% c("covOU_inso", "covOU_poll", "covOU_both", "timeOU")) {
    vs <- unname(pp["vstep"])
    alpha <- unname(pp["alpha"])
    Z <- switch(
      model_id,
      "covOU_inso" = Z_map$Z_inso,
      "covOU_poll" = Z_map$Z_poll,
      "covOU_both" = Z_map$Z_both,
      "timeOU" = Z_map$Z_time
    )
    Zc <- scale(Z, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
    slope_names <- grep("^b[0-9]+$", names(pp), value = TRUE)
    slope_names <- setdiff(slope_names, "b0")
    slope_names <- slope_names[order(as.integer(sub("^b", "", slope_names)))]
    theta_t <- unname(pp["b0"]) + as.vector(Zc %*% matrix(unname(pp[slope_names]), ncol = 1))
    for (i in 2:n) {
      G <- exp(-alpha * dt[i])
      Q <- (vs / (2 * alpha)) * (1 - exp(-2 * alpha * dt[i]))
      x[i] <- G * x[i - 1] + (1 - G) * theta_t[i] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(Q, 0)))
    }
  } else if (model_id == "URW_shift") {
    for (i in 2:n) {
      vsi <- unname(pp[paste0("vstep", gg[i])])
      x[i] <- x[i - 1] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(vsi * dt[i], 0)))
    }
  } else if (model_id %in% c("covOU_inso_vshift", "covOU_both_vshift")) {
    alpha <- unname(pp["alpha"])
    Z <- if (model_id == "covOU_inso_vshift") Z_map$Z_inso else Z_map$Z_both
    Zc <- scale(Z, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
    slope_names <- grep("^b[0-9]+$", names(pp), value = TRUE)
    slope_names <- setdiff(slope_names, "b0")
    slope_names <- slope_names[order(as.integer(sub("^b", "", slope_names)))]
    theta_t <- unname(pp["b0"]) + as.vector(Zc %*% matrix(unname(pp[slope_names]), ncol = 1))
    for (i in 2:n) {
      vsi <- unname(pp[paste0("vstep", gg[i])])
      G <- exp(-alpha * dt[i])
      Q <- (vsi / (2 * alpha)) * (1 - exp(-2 * alpha * dt[i]))
      x[i] <- G * x[i - 1] + (1 - G) * theta_t[i] + rnorm(1, 0, sqrt(max(Q, 0)))
    }
  } else {
    stop("No simulation rule written for model: ", model_id)
  }

  y_obs <- x + stats::rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = sqrt(pmax(obs_var, 0)))

  as.paleoTS(
    mm = y_obs,
    vv = y$vv,
    nn = y$nn,
    tt = y$tt,
    label = paste0(y$label, "_sim"),
    reset.time = FALSE
  )
}

# refits a model to bootstrap simulations and compares the observed
# innovation summaries to the bootstrap distribution of the same summaries
bootstrap_adequacy <- function(trait_name,
                               model_id,
                               fit,
                               y,
                               Z_map,
                               B = 250L,
                               gg = NULL,
                               pool = FALSE,
                               seed = 2024) {
  set.seed(seed)
  message("bootstrap adequacy for ", trait_name, ": ", model_id)

  obs <- adequacy_stats(fit)
  sim_stats <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = B, ncol = length(obs),
                      dimnames = list(NULL, names(obs)))

  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    yb <- tryCatch(simulate_fitted_ssm(y = y, fit = fit, model_id = model_id, Z_map = Z_map, gg = gg),
                   error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(yb)) next

    fb <- tryCatch(
      fit_single_model(model_id = model_id, y = yb, Z_map = Z_map, pool = pool, hess = FALSE, gg = gg),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(fb)) next

    sim_stats[b, ] <- adequacy_stats(fb)
  }

  tibble(
    Trait = trait_name,
    Model = model_id,
    Statistic = names(obs),
    Observed = unname(obs),
    Bootstrap_Median = apply(sim_stats, 2, stats::median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Bootstrap_Mean = apply(sim_stats, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    P_two_sided = purrr::map2_dbl(obs, seq_along(obs), ~ two_sided_boot_p(.x, sim_stats[, .y]))
  )
}

# these plotting helpers save the fitted trajectories and model-weight summaries
make_obs_fit_plot <- function(prep, fit, trait_name, model_name, scale_label, out_path) {
  sf <- extract_state_fit(fit)
  df <- tibble(
    Time_BP = prep$covariates$time_bp,
    Observed = fit$kf$xp[1, 1, ] * NA_real_,
    Fitted = sf$fitted,
    Var_f = sf$var_f
  )

  y_obs <- if (scale_label == "additive") prep$additive$mm else prep$log$mm
  df$Observed <- y_obs
  df$Lower <- df$Fitted - 1.96 * sqrt(pmax(df$Var_f, 0))
  df$Upper <- df$Fitted + 1.96 * sqrt(pmax(df$Var_f, 0))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Time_BP)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Lower, ymax = Upper), alpha = 0.18) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Fitted), linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Observed), size = 1.3) +
    scale_x_reverse() +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(trait_name, ": ", model_name, " (", scale_label, ")"),
      x = "Time (years BP)",
      y = ifelse(scale_label == "additive", trait_name, paste0("log(", trait_name, ")"))
    )

  ggplot2::ggsave(out_path, p, width = 8, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
  invisible(p)
}

make_weight_plot <- function(df, out_path) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  p <- df %>%
    mutate(Model = factor(Model, levels = unique(Model))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Model, y = weight, fill = Model)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~ Trait, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Akaike weight", title = unique(df$Analysis_Set))

  ggplot2::ggsave(out_path, p, width = 10, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
  invisible(p)
}
```

# covariates and trait series

```{r covariates-and-traits}
pollen_raw <- safe_read_csv(pollen_path, skip = 3, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)
names(pollen_raw) <- c("Years", "Pcent")
pollen_df <- pollen_raw %>% mutate(Prop = Pcent / 100)

inso_raw <- safe_read_table(inso_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)
names(inso_raw) <- c("ky", "Inso")

#  the same insolation time conversion
inso_df <- inso_raw %>% transmute(Years = -ky * 1000, Inso = Inso)

prep_map <- list(
  Diameter = prep_trait_series(trait_paths$Diameter, pollen_df, inso_df, label = "Diameter"),
  Ribs = prep_trait_series(trait_paths$Ribs, pollen_df, inso_df, label = "Ribs"),
  Spines = prep_trait_series(trait_paths$Spines, pollen_df, inso_df, label = "Spines")
)

# these summaries are written once so the sample sizes, age range, and basic trait
# scale are saved with the model outputs
trait_summary <- purrr::imap_dfr(prep_map, function(prep, nm) {
  tibble(
    Trait = nm,
    n = length(prep$additive$mm),
    age_max_bp = max(prep$covariates$time_bp, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_min_bp = min(prep$covariates$time_bp, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_spacing_years = mean(diff(prep$additive$tt), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_trait = mean(prep$additive$mm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_trait = stats::sd(prep$additive$mm, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
})

write.csv(trait_summary, file.path(tab_dir, "trait_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# the first-difference correlations are saved separately
fdiff_df <- tibble(
  Diameter = diff(prep_map$Diameter$additive$mm),
  Ribs = diff(prep_map$Ribs$additive$mm),
  Spines = diff(prep_map$Spines$additive$mm)
)

fdiff_pairs <- list(
  c("Diameter", "Ribs"),
  c("Diameter", "Spines"),
  c("Ribs", "Spines")
)

fdiff_cor_table <- purrr::map_dfr(fdiff_pairs, function(vv) {
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(fdiff_df[[vv[1]]], fdiff_df[[vv[2]]], method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  tibble(
    Trait_1 = vv[1],
    Trait_2 = vv[2],
    rho = unname(ct$estimate),
    p_value = ct$p.value
  )
})

write.csv(fdiff_cor_table, file.path(tab_dir, "first_difference_spearman_correlations.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ols_table <- bind_rows(
  fit_ols_baseline(prep_map$Diameter$additive, prep_map$Diameter$Z_both) %>% mutate(Trait = "Diameter"),
  fit_ols_baseline(prep_map$Ribs$additive, prep_map$Ribs$Z_both) %>% mutate(Trait = "Ribs"),
  fit_ols_baseline(prep_map$Spines$additive, prep_map$Spines$Z_both) %>% mutate(Trait = "Spines")
) %>% select(Trait, everything())

write.csv(ols_table, file.path(tab_dir, "ols_descriptive_baselines.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

# model sets and fitting

 defines the candidate model sets and runs the additive and log analyses

```{r model-sets-and-fitting}
baseline_models <- c("Stasis", "URW", "GRW", "OU", "ACDC")
main_env_models <- c("covOU_inso", "covOU_poll", "covOU_both")
main_expanded_models <- c(baseline_models, main_env_models)
time_control_models <- c("timeOU")
vshift_models <- c("URW_shift", "covOU_inso_vshift", "covOU_both_vshift")

# this function runs the full set of fits for one trait on one scale and stores
# the results in a list that is reused later for tables, plots, bootstraps
run_trait_analysis <- function(prep, trait_name, scale_name = c("additive", "log")) {
  scale_name <- match.arg(scale_name)
  y <- if (scale_name == "additive") prep$additive else prep$log

  Z_map <- list(
    Z_inso = prep$Z_inso,
    Z_poll = prep$Z_poll,
    Z_both = prep$Z_both,
    Z_time = prep$Z_time
  )

  gg_vshift <- build_segment_groups_bp(prep$covariates$time_bp, vshift_breaks_bp)

  res <- list(
    baseline = fit_model_set(trait_name, y, Z_map, paste0(scale_name, "_baseline"), baseline_models,
                             pool = pool_models, hess = FALSE),
    expanded = fit_model_set(trait_name, y, Z_map, paste0(scale_name, "_expanded"), main_expanded_models,
                             pool = pool_models, hess = FALSE),
    time_control = fit_model_set(trait_name, y, Z_map, paste0(scale_name, "_time_control"), time_control_models,
                                 pool = pool_models, hess = FALSE),
    vshift = fit_model_set(trait_name, y, Z_map, paste0(scale_name, "_vshift_sensitivity"), vshift_models,
                           pool = pool_models, hess = FALSE, gg = gg_vshift),
    gg_vshift = gg_vshift,
    y = y,
    Z_map = Z_map
  )

  # if the best model supports hessian refinement, refit it once more so
  # standard errors are saved for the models where that step is stable
  if (nrow(res$expanded$table) > 0) {
    best_id <- res$expanded$table$Model[which.min(res$expanded$table$AICc)]
    if (supports_hessian_refinement(best_id)) {
      res$best_hessian <- safe_fit_model(model_id = best_id, y = y, Z_map = Z_map,
                                         pool = pool_models, hess = TRUE)
      res$best_hessian_id <- best_id
    } else {
      res$best_hessian <- NULL
      res$best_hessian_id <- NULL
    }
  } else {
    res$best_hessian <- NULL
    res$best_hessian_id <- NULL
  }

  res
}

message("running additive-scale analysis")
results_additive <- purrr::imap(prep_map, ~ run_trait_analysis(.x, .y, scale_name = "additive"))

message("running log-scale analysis")
results_log <- purrr::imap(prep_map, ~ run_trait_analysis(.x, .y, scale_name = "log"))

results <- list(
  additive = results_additive,
  log = results_log
)
```

# model tables and parameter summaries

```{r tables-and-parameters}
collect_tables <- function(result_block) {
  tabs <- list(
    purrr::map(result_block, ~ .x$baseline$table),
    purrr::map(result_block, ~ .x$expanded$table),
    purrr::map(result_block, ~ .x$time_control$table),
    purrr::map(result_block, ~ .x$vshift$table)
  )
  out <- safe_bind_rows(unlist(tabs, recursive = FALSE))
  if (nrow(out) == 0) return(empty_model_table())
  out
}

all_tables <- safe_bind_rows(list(
  collect_tables(results$additive),
  collect_tables(results$log)
))
if (nrow(all_tables) == 0 || !all(c("Trait", "Analysis_Set", "Model") %in% names(all_tables))) {
  all_tables <- empty_model_table()
}

write.csv(all_tables, file.path(tab_dir, "all_model_tables.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# the additive tables are written separately because these are the main-paper tables
additive_baseline_table <- safe_bind_rows(purrr::map(results$additive, ~ .x$baseline$table))
additive_expanded_table <- safe_bind_rows(purrr::map(results$additive, ~ .x$expanded$table))
additive_time_table <- safe_bind_rows(purrr::map(results$additive, ~ .x$time_control$table))
additive_vshift_table <- safe_bind_rows(purrr::map(results$additive, ~ .x$vshift$table))

write.csv(additive_baseline_table, file.path(tab_dir, "additive_baseline_model_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(additive_expanded_table, file.path(tab_dir, "additive_expanded_model_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(additive_time_table, file.path(tab_dir, "additive_time_control_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(additive_vshift_table, file.path(tab_dir, "additive_vshift_sensitivity_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(additive_expanded_table) > 0) {
  make_weight_plot(additive_expanded_table, file.path(fig_dir, "additive_expanded_model_weights.png"))
}

log_expanded_table <- safe_bind_rows(purrr::map(results$log, ~ .x$expanded$table))
write.csv(log_expanded_table, file.path(tab_dir, "log_expanded_model_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(log_expanded_table) > 0) {
  make_weight_plot(log_expanded_table, file.path(fig_dir, "log_expanded_model_weights.png"))
}

# the best row in each trait-by-analysis block is saved
extract_best_rows <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(empty_model_table())
  df %>%
    group_by(Trait, Analysis_Set) %>%
    slice_min(AICc, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()
}

best_rows <- extract_best_rows(all_tables)
write.csv(best_rows, file.path(tab_dir, "best_model_rows.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

parameter_summary <- safe_bind_rows(list(
  purrr::imap(results$additive, function(rr, trait_name) {
    tbl <- rr$expanded$table
    if (nrow(tbl) == 0) return(NULL)
    best_id <- tbl$Model[which.min(tbl$AICc)]
    fit_obj <- rr$expanded$fits[[best_id]]
    extract_parameter_summary(fit_obj, trait_name, best_id, "additive_expanded")
  }),
  purrr::imap(results$log, function(rr, trait_name) {
    tbl <- rr$expanded$table
    if (nrow(tbl) == 0) return(NULL)
    best_id <- tbl$Model[which.min(tbl$AICc)]
    fit_obj <- rr$expanded$fits[[best_id]]
    extract_parameter_summary(fit_obj, trait_name, best_id, "log_expanded")
  })
))

# if a hessian-refined fit exists add that row and any saved SEs
# to the same parameter summary table
hess_rows <- safe_bind_rows(list(
  purrr::imap(results$additive, function(rr, trait_name) {
    if (is.null(rr$best_hessian)) return(NULL)
    tib <- extract_parameter_summary(rr$best_hessian, trait_name, rr$best_hessian_id, "additive_expanded_hessian")
    if (!is.null(rr$best_hessian$se)) {
      for (nm in names(rr$best_hessian$se)) tib[[paste0("SE_", nm)]] <- rr$best_hessian$se[[nm]]
    }
    tib
  }),
  purrr::imap(results$log, function(rr, trait_name) {
    if (is.null(rr$best_hessian)) return(NULL)
    tib <- extract_parameter_summary(rr$best_hessian, trait_name, rr$best_hessian_id, "log_expanded_hessian")
    if (!is.null(rr$best_hessian$se)) {
      for (nm in names(rr$best_hessian$se)) tib[[paste0("SE_", nm)]] <- rr$best_hessian$se[[nm]]
    }
    tib
  })
))

parameter_summary <- bind_rows(parameter_summary, hess_rows)
write.csv(parameter_summary, file.path(tab_dir, "best_model_parameter_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

# fitted trajectories

```{r fitted-trajectories}
make_trait_best_plot <- function(result_block, prep, scale_name, trait_name) {
  tbl <- result_block$expanded$table
  if (nrow(tbl) == 0) return(NULL)
  best_id <- tbl$Model[which.min(tbl$AICc)]
  best_fit <- result_block$expanded$fits[[best_id]]
  out_path <- file.path(fig_dir, paste0("fit_", trait_name, "_", scale_name, "_", best_id, ".png"))
  make_obs_fit_plot(prep = prep, fit = best_fit, trait_name = trait_name,
                    model_name = best_id, scale_label = scale_name, out_path = out_path)
}

purrr::iwalk(results$additive, ~ make_trait_best_plot(.x, prep_map[[.y]], "additive", .y))
purrr::iwalk(results$log, ~ make_trait_best_plot(.x, prep_map[[.y]], "log", .y))
```

# adequacy checks

runs the bootstrap adequacy checks

```{r adequacy-checks}
adequacy_tables <- list()

# the additive adequacy run checks the best baseline model, the best expanded
# model, and the best variance-shift model for each trait
adequacy_add <- list()
for (trait_name in names(results$additive)) {
  rr <- results$additive[[trait_name]]

  if (nrow(rr$baseline$table) > 0) {
    best_base <- rr$baseline$table$Model[which.min(rr$baseline$table$AICc)]
    adequacy_add[[paste0(trait_name, "_baseline")]] <- bootstrap_adequacy(
      trait_name = trait_name,
      model_id = best_base,
      fit = rr$baseline$fits[[best_base]],
      y = rr$y,
      Z_map = rr$Z_map,
      B = nboot_baseline,
      pool = pool_models,
      seed = 2024
    ) %>% mutate(Analysis_Set = "additive_baseline")
  }

  if (nrow(rr$expanded$table) > 0) {
    best_exp <- rr$expanded$table$Model[which.min(rr$expanded$table$AICc)]
    adequacy_add[[paste0(trait_name, "_expanded")]] <- bootstrap_adequacy(
      trait_name = trait_name,
      model_id = best_exp,
      fit = rr$expanded$fits[[best_exp]],
      y = rr$y,
      Z_map = rr$Z_map,
      B = nboot_covou,
      pool = pool_models,
      seed = 3024
    ) %>% mutate(Analysis_Set = "additive_expanded")
  }

  if (nrow(rr$vshift$table) > 0) {
    best_vs <- rr$vshift$table$Model[which.min(rr$vshift$table$AICc)]
    adequacy_add[[paste0(trait_name, "_vshift")]] <- bootstrap_adequacy(
      trait_name = trait_name,
      model_id = best_vs,
      fit = rr$vshift$fits[[best_vs]],
      y = rr$y,
      Z_map = rr$Z_map,
      B = nboot_sensitivity,
      gg = rr$gg_vshift,
      pool = pool_models,
      seed = 4024
    ) %>% mutate(Analysis_Set = "additive_vshift_sensitivity")
  }
}

adequacy_tables$additive <- safe_bind_rows(adequacy_add)
write.csv(adequacy_tables$additive, file.path(tab_dir, "adequacy_bootstrap_additive.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# the log adequacy run follows the best expanded model for each trait
adequacy_log <- list()
for (trait_name in names(results$log)) {
  rr <- results$log[[trait_name]]
  if (nrow(rr$expanded$table) > 0) {
    best_exp <- rr$expanded$table$Model[which.min(rr$expanded$table$AICc)]
    adequacy_log[[trait_name]] <- bootstrap_adequacy(
      trait_name = trait_name,
      model_id = best_exp,
      fit = rr$expanded$fits[[best_exp]],
      y = rr$y,
      Z_map = rr$Z_map,
      B = nboot_covou,
      pool = pool_models,
      seed = 5024
    ) %>% mutate(Analysis_Set = "log_expanded")
  }
}

adequacy_tables$log <- safe_bind_rows(adequacy_log)
write.csv(adequacy_tables$log, file.path(tab_dir, "adequacy_bootstrap_log.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

# saved objects

```{r saved-objects}
saveRDS(results, file.path(rds_dir, "full_analysis_results.rds"))
saveRDS(prep_map, file.path(rds_dir, "prep_map.rds"))
saveRDS(list(
  trait_summary = trait_summary,
  fdiff_cor_table = fdiff_cor_table,
  ols_table = ols_table,
  all_tables = all_tables,
  parameter_summary = parameter_summary,
  adequacy_tables = adequacy_tables
), file.path(rds_dir, "analysis_tables_bundle.rds"))

capture.output(sessionInfo(), file = file.path(output_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))

message("analysis completed; outputs written to ", output_dir)
```
